fields.helpText: This field is the back pointer to the reconciliation transaction in file 661.6

This records the quantity gained or lost after a reconciliation (stock count) transaction has been posted for a HCPCS Item (for a given Station, Location and Vendor). The transaction record in file 661.6 will record the actual quantity counted.
See comments for filed 2 - GAIN/LOSS. This is the dollar value associated with the gain or loss.
